title: GFarm
body:
### Mod only for Minecraft 1.12.2

 

The mod adds farms for harvesting, requires GregTech CEu EU to collect, is also compatible with the crop stick from the AgriCraft mod, is able to automatically push the result to the nearest inventory.
2 farm tiers harvest crops within a 4 block radius. For MV tier, the area below and above the level of the farm is added.

 

Now your crops is automated with **GregTech**!

 

Required: GregTech CE: Unofficial 2.6.1

Optional: AgriCraft 2.12.0-1.12.2-b2
